title: TPT vs Tradeify (2026): Both Shift the Rules on You — In Opposite Directions
description: Take Profit Trader vs Tradeify — TPT shifts the trail mechanic across phases (EOD→intraday→EOD); Tradeify shifts the consistency rule across programs (Growth/Select/Lightning). Honest 2026 side-by-side.

og.title: TPT vs Tradeify (2026): Both Shift the Rules — In Opposite Directions
og.description: Both firms build a lifecycle landmine. TPT moves the trail-type goalposts as you progress through phases. Tradeify moves the consistency-rule goalposts depending on which program you signed up for. Honest side-by-side.
